title: Conflict Handling in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger conflict handling in practice judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Conflict Handling in Practice is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: Conflict Handling in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good conflict handling in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Conflict Handling in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
